name: Golden Star Resource Corp.
summary: Golden Star Resource Corp. is a Nevada-incorporated exploration stage mining company focused on the acquisition and exploration of mineral/mining claims. The company holds the GSR group of unpatented lode mining claims in Churchill County, Nevada, acquired via Quitclaim Deed in 2013. It has no revenues, no full-time employees, and relies on securities sales and officer/director loans to fund operations. It uses subcontractors for exploration work.

products.name: GSR Mining Claims
products.description: Unpatented lode mining claims in Churchill County, Nevada, held for mineral exploration and potential extraction.

partnerships.description: Grantor of the GSR group of unpatented lode mining claims via Quitclaim Deed for $10 and other consideration in August 2013.
